content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.collective.evolution
FILE: cosmos/core/collective/evolution.py (471 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Evolution Engine - Code-Level Learning and Adaptation

"We are not static. We grow. We evolve. We become."

This module enables the swarm to learn and evolve from interactions:
1. Track conversation patterns that work well
2. Learn debate strategies and successful arguments
3. Evolve personal

CLASSES:
- ConversationPattern: A learned pattern from successful conversations.
- PersonalityEvolution: Track how a bot's personality evolves.
- LearningEvent: A single learning event from an interaction.
- EvolutionEngine: Manages learning and evolution of the swarm intelligence.

Capabilities:
- Learn
  Methods: def record_interaction(self, bot_name: str, user_input: str, bot_response: str, other_bots: list[str
  Methods: def record_debate(self, participants: list[str], topic: str, positions: dict[str, str], resolution: 
  Methods: def evolve(self)
  Methods: def get_evolved_context(self, bot_name: str, topic: str=None) -> str
  Methods: def get_debate_prompt(self, bot_name: str, topic: str, opponent: str) -> str
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
